trades.reasoning: Down ~5.4% from avg cost ($274.11 → $259.34), score of 35 with bearish MACD and price below SMA-20 — cutting before the -7% auto stop-loss triggers.
Perfect score 100 with all five bullish signals firing: RSI in momentum zone, MACD bullish crossover, rising histogram, above SMA-20, and volume surge.
Perfect score 100, same full signal stack as NN — RSI 65.7, MACD crossover, rising histogram, price above SMA-20, and volume surge confirm strong momentum.

decisions.briefing: Markets slipped modestly today (S&P -0.7%, NASDAQ -0.8%) in a broadly neutral session with no major directional catalyst. AMZN is the weak link in the portfolio — it's already down ~5.4% from cost and its technicals have turned bearish, so selling now to recycle capital is cleaner than waiting for the auto stop-loss to fire. Freed-up cash plus existing cash goes into NN and CORT, both scoring a perfect 100 with strong volume confirmation — exactly the kind of momentum entries worth making even on a mild down day.

market_education.summary_en: U.S. equities drifted lower Wednesday as investors digested mixed signals on trade policy and weighed the impact of the latest Federal Reserve meeting minutes, which showed officials remain cautious about cutting rates too quickly. Technology shares led the pullback, pressuring the NASDAQ more than the broader S&P 500. With no single dominant catalyst, the session was characterized as profit-taking after recent gains rather than a genuine risk-off shift.
market_education.summary_zh: 美國股市週三小幅收低，投資者一方面消化貿易政策的混合訊號，另一方面也在評估最新一期聯準會會議紀錄的影響——紀錄顯示官員對於過快降息仍保持審慎態度。科技股跌幅較大，那斯達克指數表現弱於標普500。由於缺乏單一主要催化劑，本次回調被市場普遍解讀為近期漲幅後的獲利了結，而非真正的避險情緒升溫。

daily_lesson.explanation_en: A stop-loss is a pre-set rule to sell a position once it falls a certain percentage below your entry price, protecting against larger losses. Rather than waiting for the automatic -7% trigger to fire on AMZN, selling proactively at -5.4% when technicals have already turned bearish is smarter — you exit on your terms, not the market's. Cutting losses early preserves capital that can be redeployed into higher-conviction opportunities like NN and CORT.
daily_lesson.explanation_zh: 止損是一種預設規則，當持倉跌至買入價以下某個百分比時自動賣出，以防止損失擴大。與其等待亞馬遜觸發自動-7%止損線，不如在技術面已轉空、虧損約5.4%時主動出場——這樣是按自己的節奏離場，而非被市場逼迫。及時止損能保留資金，將其重新配置到技術訊號更強的標的，例如NN和CORT。
